homepage.museumSubtitle: A Cultural Journey Through Sichuan's Red Heritage Produce
homepage.culturalIntroTitle: The Living Spirit of the Long March
homepage.culturalIntroText: Each product from Sichuan carries a moving story from the Long March. From the snow-capped highlands to the towering Jianmen Pass, from Mengding tea plantations to the Chishui River Valley, the footsteps of the Red Army and the warmth of local communities have crystallized into these precious gifts of the land.

product.audioListenEN: Listening to the Long March Story
product.audioTapToListen: Tap to Listen to the Story
